common.rateLimitNotice: The official GROK website update did not expose the rate-limits API, making it impossible to accurately calculate remaining Token usage. Please wait for the official API. Currently the count resets to 8 after auto-refresh.
common.taskInProgress: A task is already in progress
common.taskNoPause: Current task does not support pausing
common.batchNoPause: Current batch task does not support pausing
common.waitTaskFinish: Please wait for the current task to finish

login.publicSubtitle: Enter Public Key (leave empty if not configured)

config.title: Configuration
config.subtitle: Manage API keys and system parameters.
config.flaresolverrRequired: FlareSolverr URL is required when auto-refresh is enabled
config.noDesc: No description available. Please refer to the documentation.

sectionDescs.proxy: Incorrect configuration will cause 403 errors. The IP of the first request to Grok must match the IP used to obtain the CF Clearance. Subsequent IP changes will not cause 403.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.desc: Token for calling Grok2API services (optional, supports multiple, comma-separated or array).

app_key.title: Admin Password
app_key.desc: Password for logging into the Grok2API admin panel (required).

function_enabled.title: Enable Function Access
function_enabled.desc: Whether to enable the function access entry (disabled means function pages are inaccessible).

app_url.title: App URL
app_url.desc: External access URL for the Grok2API service, used for file link access.

video_format.title: Video Format
video_format.desc: Default video format (html or url, url is the processed link).

temporary.title: Temporary Chat
temporary.desc: Whether to enable temporary chat mode by default.

disable_memory.title: Disable Memory
disable_memory.desc: Whether to disable Grok memory feature by default.

stream.title: Streaming
stream.desc: Whether to enable streaming output by default.

thinking.title: Chain of Thought
thinking.desc: Whether to enable chain of thought output by default.

dynamic_statsig.title: Dynamic Fingerprint
dynamic_statsig.desc: Whether to enable dynamic Statsig fingerprint generation by default.

custom_instruction.title: Custom Instruction
custom_instruction.desc: Multi-line text passed through as Grok request parameter customPersonality.

filter_tags.title: Filter Tags
filter_tags.desc: Configure automatic filtering of special tags in Grok responses.

base_proxy_url.title: Base Proxy URL
base_proxy_url.desc: Base service address for proxying requests to Grok website.

asset_proxy_url.title: Asset Proxy URL
asset_proxy_url.desc: Address for proxying static resource (image/video) requests to Grok website.

skip_proxy_ssl_verify.title: Skip Proxy SSL Verify
skip_proxy_ssl_verify.desc: Enable when your proxy uses a self-signed certificate (only bypasses proxy certificate validation).

enabled.title: Enable CF Auto-Refresh
enabled.desc: When enabled, automatically obtains cf_clearance through FlareSolverr.

flaresolverr_url.title: FlareSolverr URL
flaresolverr_url.desc: HTTP address of FlareSolverr service (e.g. http://flaresolverr:8191).

refresh_interval.title: Refresh Interval (sec)
refresh_interval.desc: Time interval for auto-refreshing cf_clearance, recommended minimum 300 seconds.

timeout.title: Challenge Timeout (sec)
timeout.desc: Maximum time to wait for FlareSolverr to solve CF challenge.

cf_clearance.title: CF Clearance
cf_clearance.desc: Cloudflare Clearance Cookie for bypassing anti-bot verification. Automatically managed when auto-refresh is enabled.

browser.title: Browser Fingerprint
browser.desc: curl_cffi browser fingerprint identifier (e.g. chrome136). Automatically managed when auto-refresh is enabled.

user_agent.title: User-Agent
user_agent.desc: HTTP request User-Agent string. Automatically managed when auto-refresh is enabled.

max_retry.title: Max Retries
max_retry.desc: Maximum number of retries when Grok service request fails.

retry_status_codes.title: Retry Status Codes
retry_status_codes.desc: HTTP status codes that trigger a retry.

reset_session_status_codes.title: Session Reset Status Codes
reset_session_status_codes.desc: HTTP status codes that trigger session rebuild (used for proxy rotation).

retry_backoff_max.title: Backoff Max
retry_backoff_max.desc: Maximum delay (seconds) for a single retry wait.

retry_budget.title: Backoff Budget
retry_budget.desc: Maximum total retry time (seconds) for a single request.

upscale_timing.title: Upscale Timing
upscale_timing.desc: Basic pool 720p upscale mode: single upscales after each extension round, complete upscales once after all rounds.

final_timeout.title: Final Image Timeout
final_timeout.desc: Timeout (seconds) to wait for final image after receiving medium image.

blocked_grace_seconds.title: Review Grace Seconds
blocked_grace_seconds.desc: Grace seconds for suspected review/censorship after receiving medium image (default 10, configurable).

nsfw.title: NSFW Mode
nsfw.desc: Whether to enable NSFW for WebSocket requests.

medium_min_bytes.title: Medium Min Bytes
medium_min_bytes.desc: Minimum byte size for medium quality image detection.

final_min_bytes.title: Final Min Bytes
final_min_bytes.desc: Minimum byte size for final image detection (typically JPG > 100KB).

blocked_parallel_enabled.title: Enable Parallel Compensation
blocked_parallel_enabled.desc: Whether to enable parallel compensation when suspected review/blocking occurs.

blocked_parallel_attempts.title: Block Compensation Concurrency
blocked_parallel_attempts.desc: Number of parallel compensation attempts when suspected review/blocking prevents final image.

n.title: Generation Count
n.desc: Server-side unified generation count for grok-imagine-1.0-fast only (1-10).

size.title: Image Size
size.desc: Server-side unified size for grok-imagine-1.0-fast only.

response_format.title: Response Format
response_format.desc: Server-side unified response format for grok-imagine-1.0-fast only.

list_batch_size.title: Query Batch Size
list_batch_size.desc: Number of tokens per query batch. Recommended: 10.

delete_batch_size.title: Delete Batch Size
delete_batch_size.desc: Number of tokens per delete batch. Recommended: 10.

auto_refresh.title: Auto Refresh
auto_refresh.desc: Whether to enable automatic Token refresh.

refresh_interval_hours.title: Refresh Interval
refresh_interval_hours.desc: Time interval (hours) for regular Token refresh.

super_refresh_interval_hours.title: Super Refresh Interval
super_refresh_interval_hours.desc: Time interval (hours) for Super Token refresh.

fail_threshold.title: Failure Threshold
fail_threshold.desc: Number of consecutive failures before a Token is marked unavailable.

save_delay_ms.title: Save Delay
save_delay_ms.desc: Delay (ms) for batching Token change writes.

usage_flush_interval_sec.title: Usage Flush Interval
usage_flush_interval_sec.desc: Minimum interval (seconds) for writing usage data to database.

reload_interval_sec.title: Sync Interval
reload_interval_sec.desc: Token state refresh interval (seconds) in multi-worker scenarios.

enable_auto_clean.title: Auto Clean
enable_auto_clean.desc: Whether to enable automatic cache cleanup based on size limit.

limit_mb.title: Clean Threshold
limit_mb.desc: Cache size threshold (MB) that triggers cleanup.

concurrent.title: Concurrency Limit
concurrent.desc: Maximum concurrent requests for batch NSFW enable. Recommended: 10.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.desc: Batch processing count for NSFW enable. Recommended: 50.

concurrent.title: Concurrency Limit
concurrent.desc: Maximum concurrent requests for batch usage refresh. Recommended: 10.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.desc: Batch processing count for usage refresh. Recommended: 50.

token.title: Token List
token.subtitle: Manage the Grok2API Token service pool.
token.emptyState: No Tokens yet. Click Import or Add above.
token.emptyFilterState: No results for current filter. Try a different filter.
token.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this Token?
token.confirmDisable:
Are you sure you want to disable this Token?
{token}
token.confirmEnable:
Are you sure you want to enable this Token?
{token}
token.confirmBatchDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected Tokens?
token.confirmBatchDisable: Are you sure you want to disable {count} selected Tokens?
token.confirmBatchEnable: Are you sure you want to enable {count} selected Tokens?
token.noTokenToDisable: All selected Tokens are already disabled
token.noTokenToEnable: All selected Tokens are already enabled
token.nsfwConfirm: Enable NSFW mode for {count} selected Tokens?

cache.title: Cache Management
cache.subtitle: Manage local resources and online asset cache.
cache.confirmDeleteFile: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
cache.confirmBatchDeleteFiles: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected files?
cache.confirmClearAccounts: Clear online assets for {count} selected accounts?
cache.batchCleanInProgress: Batch cleaning online assets, please wait...

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: Chat with Grok via the chat API
chat.emptyState: Type a message to start a conversation.
chat.storageFull: Local storage is full, some sessions were not saved
chat.attachmentNoEdit: Attachment messages cannot be edited yet
chat.requestFailedCheck: Request failed, please check service status

imagine.title: Imagine Gallery
imagine.subtitle: Continuously generate images via WebSocket, real-time base64 gallery.
imagine.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want, e.g.: futuristic city neon rain at night, wide angle photography
imagine.waitingSubtitle: Generated images will appear here after starting a task
imagine.noImagesSelected: Please select images to download first
imagine.jszipFailed: JSZip library failed to load, please refresh and try again
imagine.editNoImages: Please upload at least one image

video.title: Video Generation
video.subtitle: Generate short videos with reference images and preset styles.
video.promptPlaceholder: e.g.: neon rain at night on the street, slow motion, film grain
video.refUploadHint: Click or drag reference image here
video.referenceConflict: Reference image: choose either URL/Base64 or file upload
video.downloadFailed: Download failed, please check if the video link is accessible
video.waitingSubtitle: Videos will appear here automatically after starting a task
video.noVideosSelected: Please select videos to download first
video.jszipFailed: JSZip library failed to load, please refresh and try again

voice.title: LiveKit Voice
voice.subtitle: LiveKit voice session, connect to Grok Voice.
voice.settingsHint: Tip: Voice / Personality settings are sent to the server before connecting.
voice.audioHint: Subscribed audio tracks will be automatically inserted here.
voice.livekitSDKError: Error: LiveKit SDK failed to load properly, please refresh the page
voice.secureContextBrowser: Please use a modern browser and allow microphone access
voice.secureContextHTTPS: Please use HTTPS or access from localhost
voice.secureContextError: Current environment does not support microphone access, {hint}
